Terms of Service

Last updated: January 2025

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing and using Hustle & Rise (the "Site," "Community," or "Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and conditions of this agreement. If you do not agree, please do not use this service.

2. User Responsibility

You agree not to use our Site or Community for unlawful purposes or in violation of these terms. You comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Specifically, you agree not to:

  • Violate any laws or regulations
  • Engage in harassment, hate speech, or harm
  • Harvest contact information without permission
  • Automatically scrape content or use bots maliciously

3. Disclaimer of Warranties

This Site is provided "as is" without warranties. Hustle & Rise makes no representations about the Site's operation, content, or materials.

4. Limitation of Liability

Hustle & Rise is not liable for damages or losses from using this Site, including indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

5. Business & Income Disclaimer

IMPORTANT: Content on Hustle & Rise is educational only. Results vary. We make no income guarantees. Past performance doesn't guarantee future results. All business ventures carry risk, including financial loss. You are responsible for your own decisions.

6. Intellectual Property

All content on this Site—text, graphics, logos, images, software—is protected by copyright. Reproduction without permission is prohibited.

7. Third-Party Links

This Site may link to external websites. We're not responsible for their content or practices. Your use is at your own risk.

8. Modification of Terms

Hustle & Rise reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use means you accept the changes.

9. Termination

Hustle & Rise may suspend or terminate your access at any time, with or without cause.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the United States.

11. Contact Us

Questions? Reach out:

Email: legal@hustleandrise.com
